## Type of Change

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused on one logical update.
- [ ] I ran `./gradlew check` from `MinimalistLauncher/`.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where appropriate.
- [ ] I updated documentation where needed.
- [ ] I preserved the text-only launcher constraint: no icons, images, analytics, or telemetry.
